I had a great experience working with the team at Minsky, McCormick & Hallagan. My case was not straightforward, but they handled everything with professionalism, attention to detail, and clear communication throughout the process. I worked with Anna regarding consulting, planning for immigration, as well as gathering evidence and statements for my case. She has been extremely professional and responsive throughout the whole process. She always replies to my emails and promptly answers my questions with great detail. I would not...
My experience with Beata Leja was exceptional. Attorney Leja and her team have done an outstanding job in my H1-B petition, she was working on my case even after business hours because it was time-sensitive. They also did a fantastic job advising my employer on how to...
